name: Horse Trader
description: Knows every trick for making a lame horse look sound and a sound horse look exceptional. Smiles too much. Always has a deal for you.
dialogue_hooks: appraising the party's mounts with professional interest
offering a 'special deal' on a horse that's 'almost' perfect
complaining about bandits disrupting the trade routes
asking where you're headed — to recommend the right horse for the terrain
voice_patterns: quiet horseman — lets the animal speak for itself
old hand — seen every trick, respects people who know horses
jovial showman — treats every sale like a performance

schedule.afternoon: showing horses to buyers, negotiating deals
schedule.evening: feeding, watering, tallying the day's sales
schedule.night: sleeping near the horses, one eye open for thieves
